block.launch_reserve_note: Launch reserve: This block is labeled because HOBC consensus assigns the 8,400,000 HOBC launch reserve subsidy at height 1.
body.p1: Search by height, block hash, txid, or HOBC address. Results come from the local HOBC node RPC. If data is not available, the explorer says so instead of inventing blocks, txids, balances, or supply.
body.p2: Not available yet. The explorer will not show fake txids.
body.p3: Reserve addresses are not_available until official tracking is connected. The explorer will not invent reserve balances.
body.p4: The configured burn address is labeled in transaction/address results when it appears.
card.burn_address.body: The configured burn address is labeled in transaction/address results when it appears.
card.burn_address.title: Burn address
card.launch_reserve_block.body: Block height 1 is clearly labeled as the launch reserve block because consensus assigns the 8,400,000 HOBC reserve subsidy there.
card.launch_reserve_block.title: Launch reserve block
card.reserve_addresses.body: Reserve addresses are not_available until official tracking is connected. The explorer will not invent reserve balances.
card.reserve_addresses.title: Reserve addresses
hero.title: Real Chain Data Only
meta.description: HOBC explorer search and sync status.
meta.title: Explorer
notice.1: Explorer status: Live values come from the local HOBC node. Unavailable data stays labeled honestly.
notice.latest_blocks_unavailable: Latest blocks are unavailable because the HOBC node is offline or syncing.
